---
title: "ECON1550 International Finance"
subtitle: "Spring 2026"
---

Welcome to the course website for ECON1550 International Finance at Brown University.

## Course Information

**Instructor:** Fernando Duarte ([fernando_duarte@brown.edu](mailto:fernando_duarte@brown.edu))

**Lectures:** Mon/Wed/Fri 2:00-2:50 PM in MacMillan Hall 115

**Links:**

- [Canvas](https://canvas.brown.edu/courses/1101477) - Announcements and grades
- [Gradescope](https://www.gradescope.com/courses/1208698) - Assignment submission

## Quick Links

- [Materials](materials.qmd) - Problem sets, slides, and lecture notes
- [Schedule](schedule.qmd) - Course schedule and due dates
